decision_note: No translation required. Video element with src attribute and internal fallback anchor preserved verbatim. URL must not be modified.

source_text: Vous utilisez un modèle de langage, mais ses réponses sont parfois erronées ou inventées ?
final_output: Are you using a language model but getting responses that are sometimes incorrect or made up?
decision_note: Declarative French sentence converted to engaging rhetorical question in en-US. 'erronées ou inventées' → 'incorrect or made up' (natural conversational pairing). 'Vous utilisez' restructured to 'Are you using' to foreground the hook. Maintains second-person address per style guide.

source_text: Ces hallucinations peuvent poser problème lorsqu'il s'agit de fiabilité et de précision.
final_output: These hallucinations can be a real problem when it comes to reliability and accuracy.
decision_note: 'poser problème' → 'be a real problem': added 'real' for emphasis consistent with conversational en-US learner tone without altering meaning. 'hallucinations' preserved as domain-standard AI/ML term.

source_text: Sans un accès direct à des sources pertinentes, votre LLM risque de fournir des informations non vérifiables, ce qui peut nuire à la confiance et à la qualité de vos résultats.
final_output: Without direct access to relevant sources, your LLM risks providing unverifiable information — which can undermine trust in and the quality of your results.
decision_note: 'nuire à la confiance et à la qualité' → 'undermine trust in and the quality of' (precise en-US rendering preserving dual object). Em dash used in place of comma before relative clause for clarity and stylistic flow per en-US conventions. LLM preserved as do-not-translate term.

source_text: Avec ce cours, vous allez apprendre à mettre en place un système RAG, qui améliore la justesse des réponses en s'appuyant sur des documents pertinents.
final_output: In this course, you'll learn how to build a RAG system that improves response accuracy by grounding answers in relevant documents.
decision_note: 'Avec ce cours' → 'In this course' (natural en-US course introduction phrasing). 'mettre en place' → 'build' (more direct en-US register). 'justesse des réponses' → 'response accuracy'. 's'appuyant sur' → 'grounding answers in' (idiomatic; 'grounding' is the standard en-US AI/ML term for RAG's retrieval mechanism and adds domain precision). RAG preserved as acronym.
Standard learning-objectives list header. 'vous allez' → 'you will' (formal near-future, appropriate for course objectives). Colon preserved.

source_text: Découvrir l'utilité d'un RAG pour un LLM
final_output: Understand why RAG is valuable for LLMs
decision_note: 'Découvrir l'utilité de' is literal but weak in en-US learning objectives. Replaced with 'Understand why … is valuable' — stronger cognitive framing per Bloom's taxonomy. 'pour un LLM' → 'for LLMs' (plural; more natural in en-US generalization). RAG and LLM preserved.

source_text: Créer une base de données vectorielle
decision_note: 'Créer' → 'Build' (preferred en-US action verb for technical construction tasks). 'base de données vectorielle' → 'vector database' (standard en-US data domain term; added to temp_glossary_patch).

source_text: Choisir le LLM adapté à votre besoin
final_output: Choose the right LLM for your needs
decision_note: 'adapté à votre besoin' → 'the right … for your needs' (natural idiomatic en-US rendering). LLM preserved. 'besoin' → 'needs' (plural, more natural in en-US).

'Élaborer' → 'Design' (preferred en-US professional verb for prompt authoring). 'prompt système' → 'system prompt' (standard en-US AI/ML term; word order inverted per English noun-modifier convention; added to temp_glossary_patch).

source_text: Et construire une application de discussion optimisée
final_output: And build an optimized chat application
decision_note: 'application de discussion' → 'chat application' (natural en-US equivalent; 'discussion application' is not standard in en-US tech contexts). 'construire' → 'build' (consistent with seg_08). 'Et' retained as list connector. Added to temp_glossary_patch.

source_text: Ne laissez plus les hallucinations compromettre vos projets !
final_output: Don't let hallucinations hold your projects back!
decision_note: 'Ne laissez plus … compromettre' → 'Don't let … hold … back' (idiomatic en-US motivational phrasing). 'compromettre' could map to 'compromise' but 'hold back' is more energetic and conversational. Exclamation mark preserved. 'hallucinations' preserved as domain term.

source_text: Suivez ce cours et donnez à votre LLM des réponses ancrées dans les faits.
final_output: Take this course and give your LLM fact-grounded responses.
decision_note: 'Suivez ce cours' → 'Take this course' (standard en-US CTA for online courses). 'réponses ancrées dans les faits' → 'fact-grounded responses' (compound adjective hyphenated per en-US style; preserves the 'grounding' conceptual thread from seg_05).
Empty structural elements preserved verbatim. These are likely platform layout spacers. Modifying or removing them could break page rendering. No translation action required.
